proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher continuous `feature_044` values are associated with higher mean `pfs_months`; each 1-unit increase in `feature_044` increases `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_044
analyses.result_summary: Univariable OLS gave a +0.176 month slope per 1-unit increase in feature_044 (p=<1e-299). Mean pfs_months rose from 2.50 in the lowest quartile to 6.96 in the highest quartile.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ordinal `feature_027` category is associated with lower mean `pfs_months`; moving from category 0 toward category 2 decreases `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_027
analyses.result_summary: Univariable OLS gave a -1.180 month slope per category increase in feature_027 (p=<1e-299). Category means were 5.64, 4.44, and 3.29 months for categories 0, 1, and 2.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_039=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_039=0`.

analyses.code: Welch/large-sample mean comparison: pfs_months by feature_039
analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 3.62 for feature_039=1 versus 5.15 for feature_039=0; difference=-1.536 months (p=<1e-299).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_015=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_015=0`.

analyses.code: Welch/large-sample mean comparison: pfs_months by feature_015
analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 3.75 for feature_015=1 versus 4.80 for feature_015=0; difference=-1.050 months (p=<1e-299).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_046=1` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_046=0`.

analyses.code: Welch/large-sample mean comparison: pfs_months by feature_046
analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 5.41 for feature_046=1 versus 4.31 for feature_046=0; difference=1.098 months (p=<1e-299).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_069=1` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_069=0`.

analyses.code: Welch/large-sample mean comparison: pfs_months by feature_069
analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 4.86 for feature_069=1 versus 4.30 for feature_069=0; difference=0.568 months (p=<1e-299).

analyses.code: Welch/large-sample mean comparison: pfs_months by feature_010
analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 4.82 for feature_010=1 versus 4.46 for feature_010=0; difference=0.362 months (p=<1e-299).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_063=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_063=0`.

analyses.code: Welch/large-sample mean comparison: pfs_months by feature_063
analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 4.32 for feature_063=1 versus 4.78 for feature_063=0; difference=-0.459 months (p=<1e-299).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_031=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_031=0`.

analyses.code: Welch/large-sample mean comparison: pfs_months by feature_031
analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 4.33 for feature_031=1 versus 4.89 for feature_031=0; difference=-0.559 months (p=<1e-299).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher continuous `feature_062` values are associated with lower mean `pfs_months`; each 1-unit increase in `feature_062` decreases `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_062
analyses.result_summary: Univariable OLS gave a -0.0188 month slope per 1-unit increase in feature_062 (p=<1e-299). Quartile means were 4.94, 4.99, 4.53, 4.31 months from lowest to highest feature_062.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher continuous `feature_004` values are associated with higher mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_004
analyses.result_summary: Univariable OLS slope for feature_004 was 0.4988 months per unit (p=<1e-299).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher continuous `feature_037` values are associated with lower mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_037
analyses.result_summary: Univariable OLS slope for feature_037 was -0.0747 months per unit (p=<1e-299).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for the leading main-effect features, `feature_025=1` remains independently associated with higher mean `pfs_months` than `feature_025=0`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ leading features + feature_025
analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted mean difference was +0.114 months (p=1.04e-6), but in a multivariable model adjusted for the leading features the coefficient was +0.0017 months (p=0.883). The independent positive association was not supported.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for the leading main-effect features, `feature_010=1` remains independently associated with higher mean `pfs_months` than `feature_010=0`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ leading features including feature_010
analyses.result_summary: The unadjusted feature_010 difference was +0.362 months, but the adjusted coefficient was only +0.0142 months (p=0.320). The independent main effect was not supported.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `feature_046=1` with `pfs_months` is stronger among patients with `feature_069=1` than among patients with `feature_069=0`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ leading covariates + feature_069 + feature_046 + feature_069:feature_046
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction feature_069 x feature_046 was 1.559 months (p=<1e-299). Stratified feature_046 effects were -0.017 months when feature_069=0 and 1.577 months when feature_069=1.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `feature_046=1` with `pfs_months` is stronger among patients with `feature_010=1` than among patients with `feature_010=0`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ leading covariates + feature_010 + feature_046 + feature_010:feature_046
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction feature_010 x feature_046 was 1.030 months (p=<1e-299). Stratified feature_046 effects were 0.399 months when feature_010=0 and 1.491 months when feature_010=1.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `feature_046=1` with `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `feature_031=1` than among patients with `feature_031=0`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ leading covariates + feature_031 + feature_046 + feature_031:feature_046
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction feature_031 x feature_046 was -1.666 months (p=<1e-299). Stratified feature_046 effects were 1.659 months when feature_031=0 and 0.036 months when feature_031=1.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `feature_046=1` with `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `feature_063=1` than among patients with `feature_063=0`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ leading covariates + feature_063 + feature_046 + feature_063:feature_046
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction feature_063 x feature_046 was -1.338 months (p=<1e-299). Stratified feature_046 effects were 1.350 months when feature_063=0 and -0.014 months when feature_063=1.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association between continuous `feature_062` and `pfs_months` is stronger among patients with `feature_046=1` than among patients with `feature_046=0`.

analyses.code: OLS interaction: pfs_months ~ leading covariates + feature_062 * feature_046
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted feature_062 x feature_046 interaction was -0.0532 months per feature_062 unit (p=<1e-299). Unadjusted feature_062 slopes were -0.0004 for feature_046=0 and -0.0528 for feature_046=1.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association between continuous `feature_062` and `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `feature_031=1` than among patients with `feature_031=0`.

analyses.code: OLS interaction: pfs_months ~ leading covariates + feature_062 * feature_031
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted feature_062 x feature_031 interaction was +0.0294 months per feature_062 unit (p=<1e-299). Unadjusted slopes were -0.0295 for feature_031=0 and 0.0003 for feature_031=1.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `feature_069=1` with `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `feature_031=1` than among patients with `feature_031=0`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ leading covariates + feature_069 + feature_031 + feature_069:feature_031
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted feature_069 x feature_031 interaction was -0.825 months (p=<1e-299). Stratified feature_069 effects were 0.845 months when feature_031=0 and 0.045 months when feature_031=1.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `feature_069=1` with `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `feature_063=1` than among patients with `feature_063=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted feature_069 x feature_063 interaction was -0.649 months (p=<1e-299). Stratified feature_069 effects were 0.687 months when feature_063=0 and 0.027 months when feature_063=1.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `feature_010=1` with `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `feature_031=1` than among patients with `feature_031=0`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ leading covariates + feature_010 + feature_031 + feature_010:feature_031
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted feature_010 x feature_031 interaction was -0.555 months (p=<1e-299). Stratified feature_010 effects were 0.554 months when feature_031=0 and -0.003 months when feature_031=1.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between continuous `feature_044` and `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `feature_039=1` than among patients with `feature_039=0`.
The positive association between continuous `feature_044` and `pfs_months` is weaker at higher ordinal `feature_027` categories.

analyses.code: OLS interaction: pfs_months ~ leading covariates + feature_044 * feature_039
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted feature_044 x feature_039 interaction was -0.0106 months per feature_044 unit (p=<1e-299). Unadjusted feature_044 slopes were 0.1795 for feature_039=0 and 0.1684 for feature_039=1.

analyses.code: OLS interaction: pfs_months ~ leading covariates + feature_044 * feature_027
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted feature_044 x feature_027 interaction was -0.0062 months per feature_044-by-category unit (p=<1e-299), indicating a weaker feature_044 slope at higher feature_027 category.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The `feature_044` association with `pfs_months` has positive quadratic curvature; the positive slope becomes stronger at higher `feature_044` values.
The `feature_062` association with `pfs_months` has positive quadratic curvature; the negative slope flattens at higher `feature_062` values.
After adjustment for leading features, the combined presence of `feature_069=1` and `feature_010=1` has a positive interaction on `pfs_months` beyond their additive effects.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_044 + centered(feature_044)^2
analyses.result_summary: Quadratic model for feature_044 gave a positive centered-square coefficient of +0.000604 (p=<1e-299).

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_062 + centered(feature_062)^2
analyses.result_summary: Quadratic model for feature_062 gave a positive centered-square coefficient of +0.000386 (p=<1e-299).

analyses.code: OLS interaction: pfs_months ~ leading covariates + feature_069 * feature_010
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted feature_069 x feature_010 interaction was +0.0234 months with p=0.451, so the positive beyond-additive interaction was not supported.
